pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 11 and export_result.sh line 7; consistently used across all task scripts
Task description explicitly states 'Create a new Fragment named SettingsFragment in com.example.tasktracker'; setup_task.sh line 41 shows namespace='com.example.tasktracker'
Task description explicitly states layout file name is 'fragment_settings.xml'
Task description explicitly states action ID is 'action_home_to_settings'; matches Android Navigation conventions
Task description explicitly states destination ID is 'settingsFragment'; follows camelCase naming pattern consistent with 'homeFragment'

Referenced in setup_task.sh line 12; however /workspace/ directory does not exist in this environment. setup_task.sh includes fallback logic (lines 23-108) to generate synthetic project if data source missing. Data directory at /compute/.../examples/android_studio_env/data/ does not contain TaskTracker subdirectory.

privileged_info_summary: The extend_navigation_graph task requires implementing navigation UI in a TaskTracker Android app. The project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/TaskTracker. Users must implement a SettingsFragment class (com.example.tasktracker.SettingsFragment) with layout file fragment_settings.xml, add a destination with ID settingsFragment in the navigation graph, create an action with ID action_home_to_settings pointing to settingsFragment, and implement navigation logic in HomeFragment. The TaskTracker project is entirely synthetic, generated by the setup_task.sh fallback mechanism because the claimed data source (/workspace/data/TaskTracker) does not exist in the environment.
